title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入巴劳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入巴勞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Ministry of Public Infrastructure, Industries & Commerce (MPIC) product conformity requirements, Utilities Regulation and Competition Authority (MPIC) grid-connection regulations, Palau Public Utilities Corporation (PPUC) (PPUC) interconnection technical specifications, UL 1973 / UL 9540 / UL 9540A battery safety standards, IEEE 1547 grid-interconnection standard, NFPA 855 fire-installation code, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 60 Hz / 120–240 V US-heritage grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与巴劳标准和质量局（MPIC）产品合格评定要求、公用事业监管和竞争局（MPIC）并网规定、巴劳电力照明公司（PPUC）互联技术规格、UL 1973/UL 9540/UL 9540A电池安全标准、IEEE 1547并网互联标准、NFPA 855消防安装规范、UN 38.3运输要求及60 Hz/120–240 V美式电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與巴勞標準和質量局（MPIC）產品合格評定要求、公用事業監管和競爭局（MPIC）併網規定、巴勞電力照明公司（PPUC）互聯技術規格、UL 1973/UL 9540/UL 9540A電池安全標準、IEEE 1547併網互聯標準、NFPA 855消防安裝規範、UN 38.3運輸要求及60 Hz/120–240 V美式電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MPIC conformity scope determination, MPIC grid-connection approval, PPUC interconnection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Palau MPIC standards, MPIC regulations, PPUC interconnection technical requirements, applicable UL/IEEE/NFPA standards, UN transport regulations, and hurricane/resilience design requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MPIC合格评定范围裁定、MPIC并网批准、PPUC互联批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴劳MPIC标准、MPIC法规、PPUC互联技术要求、适用UL/IEEE/NFPA标准、UN运输法规及飓风/韧性设计要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MPIC合格評定範圍裁定、MPIC併網批准、PPUC互聯批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴勞MPIC標準、MPIC法規、PPUC互聯技術要求、適用UL/IEEE/NFPA標準、UN運輸法規及颶風/韌性設計要求。

answer_first.en: The Palau presents a fundamentally different technical baseline from China for BESS exports. The most critical gap is the grid frequency and voltage mismatch: the Palau operates on a 60 Hz / 120–240 V (single-phase) / 208–240 V (three-phase) US-heritage grid — versus China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V system. This means BESS power conversion systems (PCS) designed and validated for China's 50 Hz grid cannot be directly deployed in the Palau; full 60 Hz revalidation is required. The practical compliance gates for Chinese BESS exported to the Palau are: (1) UL 1973 (batteries for stationary applications) and UL 9540 / UL 9540A (energy storage system and fire test) — the US-lineage standards referenced by MPIC and project owners in place of IEC 62619 alone; (2) IEEE 1547-2018 grid-interconnection standard as expected by MPIC and PPUC for distributed energy resources including storage; (3) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation code as the internationally dominant stationary BESS fire standard; (4) MPIC conformity assessment — verify the current regulated-product list directly with MPIC, as no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific Technical Regulation has been publicly identified; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory for all lithium battery sea freight transiting Nassau or Freeport; and (6) hurricane-resilience design — the Palau lies in a high-cyclone-risk zone and PPUC / project owners may require wind (up to 155 mph design wind speed) and flood derating specifications for outdoor BESS enclosures. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 are the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for UL or IEEE evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 对于BESS出口而言，巴劳与中国的技术基准存在根本性差异。最关键的差距在于电网频率和电压不匹配：巴劳采用60 Hz/120–240 V（单相）/208–240 V（三相）美式传统电网——而中国为50 Hz/220–380 V系统。这意味着针对中国50 Hz电网设计和验证的BESS储能变流器（PCS）不能直接在巴劳部署；须进行完整的60 Hz重新验证。中国BESS出口巴劳的实际合规门槛包括：（1）UL 1973（固定应用电池）和UL 9540/UL 9540A（储能系统及火灾测试）——MPIC和项目业主引用的美式标准，而非单纯依赖IEC 62619；（2）IEEE 1547-2018并网互联标准，为MPIC和PPUC对包括储能在内的分布式能源的预期要求；（3）NFPA 855消防安全安装规范，国际上占主导地位的固定式BESS消防标准；（4）MPIC合格评定——直接向MPIC核实现行受监管产品清单，目前尚未公开确认针对BESS的强制性技术法规；（5）UN 38.3运输测试文件，所有经马拉卡尔/科罗尔转运的锂电池海运货物强制要求；（6）飓风韧性设计——巴劳位于高飓风风险区，PPUC/项目业主可能要求室外BESS机柜的抗风（设计风速可达155英里/小时）和防洪降额规格。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为UL或IEEE证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 對於BESS出口而言，巴勞與中國的技術基準存在根本性差異。最關鍵的差距在於電網頻率和電壓不匹配：巴勞採用60 Hz/120–240 V（單相）/208–240 V（三相）美式傳統電網——而中國為50 Hz/220–380 V系統。這意味著針對中國50 Hz電網設計和驗證的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）不能直接在巴勞部署；須進行完整的60 Hz重新驗證。中國BESS出口巴勞的實際合規門檻包括：（1）UL 1973（固定應用電池）和UL 9540/UL 9540A（儲能系統及火災測試）——MPIC和項目業主引用的美式標準，而非單純依賴IEC 62619；（2）IEEE 1547-2018併網互聯標準，為MPIC和PPUC對包括儲能在內的分布式能源的預期要求；（3）NFPA 855消防安全安裝規範，國際上佔主導地位的固定式BESS消防標準；（4）MPIC合格評定——直接向MPIC核實現行受監管產品清單，目前尚未公開確認針對BESS的強制性技術法規；（5）UN 38.3運輸測試文件，所有經馬拉卡爾/科羅爾轉運的鋰電池海運貨物強制要求；（6）颶風韌性設計——巴勞位於高颶風風險區，PPUC/項目業主可能要求室外BESS機櫃的抗風（設計風速可達155英里/小時）和防洪降額規格。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為UL或IEEE證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
